title: Servant's Entrance
writer: Sigrid Boo, Sölve Cederstrand, Tancred Ibsen
actors: Carl Barcklind, Tutta Rolf, Bengt Djurberg
plot: Helga Breder is a young, spoiled girl. To her beloved Jörgen she says that she, as a modern young woman is multi-talented and can do whatever she likes. Jörgen bets that she can't work as a house-maid but, if she manages it, he wi...
